title: Amtech D2200 280mm (11") C clamp

features: PROTECTS SURFACES: This 280mm (11") C clamp has a quick-release lever and self-adjusting flat jaws for surface protection
HEAVY DUTY: With an 80mm jaw capacity, it is made from drop forged and heat treated steel and is ideal for welding and metal shop work
SIZE CAPACITY: 280mm range ideal for plumbing and trade tasks
PRECISION CUTTING: Provides smooth and accurate results
GENERAL DIY TASKS: Versatile addition to any home or professional toolkit
